creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption: Did you know about this Grand Central Secret? #nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist

transcription.text: Did you know that if you come to Grand Central and look for this flag, turn to the right, go through this tunnel, take a left, another left, and go down this ramp, you'll see people randomly standing in corners. And that's because when you stand in one of these corners and whisper, the ceramic tiles will carry your whisper to the other side where you and your friend can share secrets. This is called the whispering gallery.
